name: Startia Holdings,Inc.
summary: Startia Holdings,Inc. engages in the IT business in Japan and internationally. It offers IT infrastructure, including system integration, high-speed Internet, communication line, countermeasure, MFP, business phone, network construction/maintenance, cloud file server, and others; and develops and sells cloud applications related to digital marketing, such as Website creation/management tool, AR creation tool, marketing automation tool, and document management/e-book creation software. The company also provides PC automation, document central management, online storage, Intelligent backup, and number collection/storage services; corporate venture capital; and disability people employment services. The company was formerly known as Startia, Inc. and changed its name to Startia Holdings,Inc. in April 2018. Startia Holdings,Inc. was founded in 1996 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
